title: Greek Chickpea Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Greek-inspired stew made with chickpeas, rich and dense ingredients, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper, cooking until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the canned diced tomatoes, chickpeas, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Stir in the lemon juice and feta cheese crumbles.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the stew is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano, if desired.
